LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF DEC-09-1996 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $25.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD; LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR & THE OTHER 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
